{{CargoOrgan
|name=Big Guy Park's Chest Hair
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10819
|idx=20
|description=Big Guy Park was badly injured while fighting the Demon Gods, his endocrine system was severely damaged, changing him from a hairy man to hairless!
|skill=
|hp=660
|def=152
|atk=117
|rush=82
|gene1=Deadly Ironball effect +10%
|gene2=In explorations, {race} DEF +20
|gene3=Deadly Ironball effect +10%
|gene7=Deadly Ironball effect +10% (Awakened)
|}}
